data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Secures user accounts with an additional factor of authentication.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data from the user's device to the server to protect privacy.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network traffic for suspicious activities.

data.title: Data Anonymization
data.description: Personal data is anonymized to reduce privacy risks.

data.title: Bot Prevention Measures
data.description: Protects the platform from automated bots to ensure fair usage.
